feedback_text: trying to connect squarespace, but you don't let me map the correct data

My most recent campaign very clearly has erroneous data (over 8% click rate, when on average, click rate hovers between 2-4%) and I can't figure out why - mailchimp's help articles are vague and unhelpful, and I'm forced to go to Reddit forums where other users have similar problems but are also facing insufficient answers.
Mailchimp was glitching and there wasn't any way to report the issues. The virtual assistant was no help.

Shopify integration overwrote (set from subscribed to non-subscribed) 10K of my 60K subscribed contacts. I've been on the phone to support (support is excellent!) but informed there is no way to roll back to a previous good state. 

For a software service we pay $1000/month for, this is a BASIC feature that I fully expected would be provided. It is absolutely shocking that I'm not able to fix this error which was wildly easy to make... I wasn't given any warning that this KEY conflicting property would be overridden by the new data, and that this could have catastrophic impacts on my list that weren't fixable.

Can we have a way to export data on this page, please?

https://us12.admin.mailchimp.com/analytics/marketing-dashboard/
Non riesco a programmare l'invio in altra data. E oggi non riesco neanche ad effettuare un invio immediato. Come mai? Il tasto "Invia" non ubbidisce al mio comando.

A lot of "buttons" don't do what I expect them to (sometimes clicking on "Audience" takes me to the audience dashboard, but other times is just collapses the subcategories, and I have to push it again), and a lot of features/settings are a maze to find (it is . Creating campaigns can sometimes feel like pulling teeth... like when I remove an element before replacing it with something different, it automatically assumes that I want to change the layout (say, from three columns to just one
the reporting is very difficult and the downloaded csv files have conflicting information from the reports in the portal.

I recently learned that the individual reports and dashboards show different data because the MPP filter isn't available on the Reports or All Campaigns tabs. It'd be valuable to have the option for all the data to show the same results on the dashboard layouts, not just on the individual reports. The Marketing Dashboard does have the option, but doesn't lay out the records aren't per campaign.

It would be incredibly helpful if mailchimp emails out the user interface updates they make, so companies can save time from trying to figure out what changed on their dashboard.

We have experienced this before when a user interface update/change was made to Audience Segments, which resulted in our team spending hours to self-diagnose and then eventually chatting with one of your agents to figure out why we couldn't segment our audience lists the way we use to.

After discovering the new steps/process with the help of a live agent, then Mailchimp ended up changing the Segmenting feature back to it's original capability shortly after. Very frustrating and a lot of time wasted.

Is there a way for your development teams to test things before launching it to customers? We don't know what's changing and why and it affects our work processes. Please test before launching and please email the new processes when you do decide to make permanent changes, so that we do not have to reach out to an agent and figure things out on our own. This ends up causing a bad user experience for customers when our previous work processes change on us without any notification or tutorial video.

Thank you for reading this feedback.
It's a shame that the alternatives for free use (we are a charity with a small database) have become so limited.  It would be really useful to be able to link pdfs to an email.
when i send/share a report with a partner, some details are not showing (i.e. predicted demographics).  It shows in my report when I'm logged in - but not when I share direct to email.
DEMOGRAPHICS DATA TAKES TOO LONG TO SHOW UP, AND I HAVE ONLY 15 CONTACTS... MAKES NO SENSE

I like Mailchimp a lot, but navigating through the webpages can be harder than I'd like, they're so busy. There's so much duplicate or unneeded information. For example, right now I'm on the Automations page, trying to edit a Journey, but before I can find my Journeys there's an ad for AI powered Journeys, then a block offering recommended Journeys, then after a scroll I can see my Journeys. But then another block offering pre-built Journeys, then another offering help. I can see that I can find Pre-built Journeys in your nav on the left.

Generally on most pages there's way too much stuff on the screen at once, making it hard to focus on my own information. I'd like to see a lot more information that relates to my own metrics on screen, rather than new things that you think I want. I think that most of your audience is more competent than your UI allows.

On the flip-side I love the visual way we're able to edit a Journey, that is a genius step!!!

The documentation on your data sources is very challenging to find. There are differences in data that seems like it should all be standardized. The API has different statistics than the custom reports, which can sometimes differ from the "Reports" themselves. Which one is most up to date? When I spoke with someone in support, they were very helpful but couldn't tell me the update schedules to parse out the differences. It is also difficult to access some of the data. Why must the clicks by link data be individually downloaded from each email campaign?

I have other feedback that I can't recall at this moment, but one thing that is top of mind is the widget for apple.  It would be great to be able to select a specific QR code to live at the widget image instead of it rotating automatically based on recent campaigns.  Right now a coworkers metrics are what shows on my screen, but what would be really useful is if I could set the QR code for my signup landing page as the image so when I am working tradeshows it could be instantly available.  I tried a workaround by adding it to my blinq card, but it created more steps and issues, and I had probably 30 new subscribers walk away because of the extra time the process was taking.
the report numbers on some emails are insanely inaccurate.

You have made major progress in being able to edit in the Mobile mode.  However, we still must cleanse our Word copy through Notebook to get a proper placement in the text boxes. This was not a problem in the old template only a problem with the 2023 revisions. I am still looking to switch from MailChimp to other platforms because of these quirks and the errors in reporting but management doesn't want to do a mailing list conversion. When I can wear them down, we will switch!

I hope there will be the function to see pre report for the scheduled campaign.
Especially want to check email template performance like that I can see after finished campaign.
Hi! I was unable to make a report. I selected the box, to export as a CSV and it failed multiple times.
People on my distribution tell me that they do not receive the emails I send through Mailchimp, but Mailchimp reports that they were sent successfully
Please include journeys in the reporting seciton and ability to restore accidentally deleted data.

Lots of information and not all of it is useful. Can you simplify the high-level results shown?
Can you explain why the open rate is listed as different numbers in different parts of the report? Why the location stats seem plain wrong - why would so many USA based people open the email when we sent it to Australians?
The tips for improving content is great. But it needs to be easier to hide info that's not relevant and reduce screen clutter. Or to be able to select the data I want to transfer into a custom report.

I am often encountering difficulties with Mail Chimp and find it a bit frustrating. EG we have many on our database with emails starting with admin or info and these are getting rejected so I have to do this manually. Also hard to locate an email to change.  Formatting a campaign is also sometimes a bit difficult.  Many emails sent end up in junk folders. I can't even find what plan we are on.

In a newsletter that has been emailed, when someone clicks on the social share button for LinkedIn, LinkedIn doesn't always grab the appropriate image for the newsletter. It should use the first image at the top of the newsletter, which would be the banner, but it doesn't always.

LinkedIn says it will prioritize whatever image is listed in this metadata tag:

<meta name="image" property="og:image" content="[Image URL here]">

Perhaps Mailchimp can provide a field where users can select an image from their newsletter and mark it to be the metadata tag image on the campaign-archive page. Please let me know if that’s something that Mailchimp would consider doing so that I can inform my many clients who use Mailchimp and LinkedIn.

The expense of mailchimp vs actual verified opens and deliveries is shocking. I'm looking at the number of opens in my campaigns and where I see 1 open, that is not a real open. I messaged peeople I know on the list and they've never opened the email.

For such a massive expense and such low quality, apparently falsified results even facotring in the apple open switch, alongside having to wade throuhg your endless zip files and downloads and pages buried under pages.. what is the point of £1600 a year PLUS all the time when its going straight down the toilet?

I'm wasting my time and money marketing to fuck all. My business is not propering with mailchimp, and your misleading metrics are holding back businesses.

What are you going to do about it?

Great that you're reponding to my feedback on allowing right clicking i(ffs) on buttons, but why the fuck are you even needing told that? Its just getting worse really, despite some responsiveness around your developement/changes.

the quality that you deliver and falsified/misleading resutls are very poor. I do expect a meaningful answer to this.
On the regular report there´s a checkbox that allows you to compare with and without MPP. But not on the multivariate test report. It makes it difficult to compare apples to apples

Apple MPP article says "We’ll display an Excluded or Included Apple MPP status in sections with open-related metrics," but the All Campaigns display DOES NOT let me know Apple MPP is Included (though it is), nor does the Click Summary data on the Click Map interface from the Click performance tab of my Campaign Report, which also includes Apple MPP opens in the Open Rate.
Please enact your stated policy consistently across the platform! I've lost HOURS to confusion and communication over this discrepancy.

This article says "We’ll display an Excluded or Included Apple MPP status in sections with open-related metrics."
I see "Excludes Apple MPP" on the Overview tab of my Campaign Report, but I DO NOT see "Includes Apple MPP" on the "All Campaigns" interface, which Does include Apple MPP, nor in the Click Summary on the Click performance tab of my Campaign Report, which also Does include Apple MPP. Please ensure to implement your stated policy thoroughly and effectively across the interface!!

I didn't know why the "All Campaigns" summary page show 3334 Opens = 47.8% Open Rate for my March 11 campaign, but the Report for that same campaign shows 1953 opens for 28%

Mailchimp has not picked up a couple of new leads from my pop window on my http://Square.Site website. When clients or customers place an order on my website, the new client/customer information gets transferred to MailChimp but in the last 2 weeks my new leads are not showing on my MailChimp Dashboard.

I'm looking at my email campaign's report.  'Exclude Apple MPP' is the default, but later on the comparison to my other campaigns apparently does not.  So the report splits to different data piles at the same time.  For example, seeing a 15% Open rate under Email performance, but then being told I had 65% opens when comparing campaigns.

I like the ability to see link clicks, but even if Apple MMS is blocked, I'm pretty sure other email apps are skewing the data by automatically opening emails and summarizing links. Replicating and sending again to unopened are useful. Could Mailchimp automatically offer a segment based on the last email sent allowing you to tailor a new email to a group that did or did not open the last email?

Quite a number of people on my mail list don't receive my emails for Mailchimp database! very frustration. I've asked them to include my email in their contacts. thinking about going to another list provider
I purchase a plan first time from your website and try to send emailer to our data. After that i received issue in my account, and i contact to customer support. but they have no any solution.
Running audience reports and managing subscribers are something I"m still trying to figure out and haven't had much success or help.
I wish you had more features like klavyio - richer testing, data reporting, benchmarking, clearer segemntation. I always feel lost and bogged down by your app

Once a week for almost 10 years I send an email through Mailchimp and each time I have to fill in all the same fields as if for the first time. For ex. I send at the same time each week. Why can't it just default to that setting? For a few months I didn't have to type in the name of my report. It popped up when I clicked the field. Now it's stopped.
The Google Analytics sends me in a loop. There's no way to put in my tracking ID or anything. You click and it goes right back to nothing.

I am unhappy with the changes that you made to the report. It does not report the correct number of opens. I have to count the number of people in the list of opens. Either the number is much too low (8 reported when there were 27) or it gives the total opens not the number of people that have opened.

Some of my fields recently disappeared. I don't know if you all deleted my data - but I would like the fields restored. More fields are very helpful for me to use this tool to support my project - so I can keep track of who these people are. Without the ability to have about 20-30 fields, Mailchimp is a much less useful tool, and would make my possibly switch to another tool.

It would be a dream come true if I could view reports by Segment. We currently send out 6 identical emails to segment based off of order recency. We do this because there is no other way to view response data via recency. Ideally I would love to be able to send one email and then view the reporting by segment. This would solve our recency problem and allow much better view of customer interactions from other groups. As a company that sells pens it would be great to see how Fountain Pen users interacted with an email verseus how a ballpoint user interacted for example.
SMS Campaign Report not functioning

- Double-opt in should work with triggers in automated journeys
- Pop-up form isn't working correctly; either has limited functionality and cannot be tracked with GA4
- Analytics for beta pop-up wasn't working
- Customer service has little to no technical knowledge of products.
Segment reports do not work, you cannot report on a specific email with a specified date range, analytics often do not line up from one page to another by 1,000's for opens clicks etc.

It would be very helpful if the "Customer Journey Report" was shareable like other reports in MailChimp.  Our CEO, who doesn't access MailChimp would like to keep an eye on the journey, since he is the one who writes the emails, but it is difficult to share metrics with them.

Reporting is terrible. It doesn't mean even the basic needs.
If I do a testing, and I always do a testing, I can't check how many companies, contacts were reached, how many companies (and which), and contacts opened - within a whole campaign. I have to always check each test group. Which makes it 10 times more from my side. The analytics, which shouldn't take more than 30% of the time, takes 70% of the time! 
Not to mention the limited data I have access to.
I'm very dissatisfied, running accounts for different companies, we're already thinking about switching to other services because of huge time efforts
i hate them all.  Cant get rid of field i do not want to use without it telling me I wiil lose all data associated with that field.

Why are there so many steps to schedule the same campaign on multiple days and to multiple lists? Is a way to add multiple lists to one single campaign? It would make so much more sense when looking at the analytics.

Why can't there be a way to schedule the same campaign to go out on multiple dates? It's so much more labor intensive to use your scheduling tool than to just send it out manually every time. Unfortunately, this method can be unreliable.

We feel there is consistenly problems with the quality of click rate data. We see inflated blanket numbers (where each link within an email has the exact same number of clicks, usually around 143 clicks) and falsely inflated numbers on indivudal contacts (1 contact with 38 clicks on the same link).

hace dos semanas, me pareció que la página estaba caída, intentaba montar una campaña y no se quería enviar. Me toco reiniciar mi laptop, cerrar la página y volverla abrir. 

Sería bueno que cuando pasen estas cosas, envíen un reporte o anuncio de que está caída. 

Gracias.

- Report needs to be added that shows the clicks AFTER Apple MPP is removed. 
- The user experience trying to add/remove/edit content boxes is choppy and difficult to navigate. 
- Connecting our Instagram has been terrible. Sometimes it works, sometimes it doesn't, more often than not there is an error message. 
- Adding/using our preferred fonts has been so difficult, even your customer service rep couldn't figure out how I was using one of the fonts, so they recommended just copying that template each time so I didn't lose it.

Something has changed recently and uploading audience data is now a nightmare. The info I am uploading which previusly would have been done in a matter of seconds now is next to impossible, amking the job frustrating, labour intensive and extremely inefficient. I am now considering switching to another provider.

You're too expensive for what I get, and even though you may think it's easy to use, it isn't. Given the approach of simple dashboards, you're UI is woefully behind the curve.  I am only using Mailchimp because a marketing firm I work with is connected to your backend.  The minute that ends, which is probably in a month or two, I'll be switching over to a much more user friendy, and less expensive alternative.  As my contact list grew, I felt like I was being "nickel and dimed" at every turn.  I simply upgraded to 10,000 subcribers eventually, just to not deal with your team any more fighting every inch.  I am about to exceed 10,000 subscribers I'm happy to say, but don't want to spend more money, but looks like I have no choice.  I never recommend Mailchimp.  You're approach to client support and value isn't there.
merge fields just are not showing up for data collection in survey drop down

Non sono chiari i passaggi, difficile capire come gestire le varie fasi. Per quanto parli bene l'inglese però su una nuova attività non è sempre facile ed intuitivo in un'altra lingua. Peccato perché poi il survey è in italiano, quindi... comunque riproverò nei prossimi giorni. Devo attivare una welcome mail per i nuovi iscritti e mi sembra tutto molto lungo, troppi passaggi, non è chiaro se verrà rimandata a tutti o meno, se e come possa dividere il mio pubblico che riceve due newsletter diverse, se e come i nuovi iscritti riescano a sapere a quale delle due newsletter si sono iscritti, insomma un po' lungo. Vedremo

Some of the data I receive from the Analytics tab seems difficult to replicate. Also, I don't understand  how links in my emails (such as the Terms of Use link) can garner 5.6% of all clicks (out of thousands of clicks) when it is normally, and understandably, 0%.
in the email reports, in predicted demographics, the legend is not consistent between the gender pie chart and the age bar chart. the colors are swapped so it's contradicting.

I'm trying to delete an audience and finding it impossible. I've navigated between audience dashboard and audience settings about 5 times each and there's no option to delete an audience. I've even cleared out all the contacts. I'm trying to delete it so I can downgrade my membership to fit into the requirements of the lesser membership and having a difficult time.

We have paid Standard package and cannot track analitics.
I cannot see opens and clicks , always is 0% 
and have tested , send campaign to 3 emails, everybody opened, and noting is visible in dashboard
Help what to do

I am trying to contact support, but I have faced several issues. I cannot submit a question, and when I am connected, there is no representative available to assist me. This is what I am trying to fix. For the past several months I have had repeat numbers show up like 144 clicks on a bunch of my links or out of the 22 people who opened my email they all clicked 7 times. This feels very strange and I would like to figure out why so I can have accurate data.

For some reason every time I have the word "today" in an e-mail campaign, it makes the text black and I have another text color and even when I clear the formatting, it still continues to change the text color.  I'm still trying to figure it out, but once the formation is changed, it should take this away.  So, that's little mind boggling.  I didn't reach out for in-person support, but will.  Additionally, the analytics doesn't capture the opens correctly.  The campaign page and the actually page for each page show different numbers of opens.  Looks like a glitch.  Thanks!

Poca possibiltà di gestire template personalizzati in modo effettivamente custom. molti vincoli quando cerco di creare un mio template. 

I report sono poco attendibili con tassi di apertura assolutamente non corrispondenti alla realtà (sovrastimati).

Mailchimp cannot load double email addresses or an email field that is blank. We have many different clients with different names but may have the same email address but we still need those clients to remain with the database in one area. I need Billing to contact me and refund.   Mel Bettenay 0480595878 or email admin@bala.academy

The reports - I would like to be able to create a report as customer interactions showing my most engaged contacts.

I use a workaround downloading csvs for opens and clicks, this takes me a while.
I find if I update a contact that has an internal bounce and I then archive them, they continue to be counted in my report. It would be great if I could exclude these people and rerun my report

Make ALL buttons right-clickable. I want to open multiple reports in different tabs, not be held hostage to drilling into a page to then find a new dropdown menu to switch a report each time.  Iwant to have option to have many repots in diff tabs. i also want the pill buttons and dropdown bits in them e.g. view/edit emails to be right clickable. I should be able to open EVERYTHING in a new tab from right clicking. Also, invert your filters on the tables - nobody wants to see first the smallest value in opens/clicks etc. Show the largest numbers first = one less click = a few less seconds wasted waiting to get the value I want. Also show on the campaigns page how many people will receive a given email. Otherwise i have to PAUSE AND FKIN EDIT to check its the right number or that its updated if i uploaded new contacts. then <yawn> schedule again. Stop hiding key info behind other screens and don't be a dick and put all these enhancements behind a paywall. Thanks.
why my top location by opens mostly from United States? even our database location mostly are Indonesian and live in Indonesia?
Not using mailchimp but need to retain data as it is a non-profit, not sending anything but cannot reduce monthly charges. We donate every dollar so it's frustrating I am paying this myself.

I was hoping to get some reports on our membership (EG, print out list of users where x date is greater than y). It's very hard to analyze our actual audience. All of the reports are just for campaigns.

Supposedly after logging in we don't need to do secondary verification for a week or whatever, yet I need to enter a code that has been texted to me EVERY DAY. Your customer service responds that the issue is on my end, but my IT Dept. reports it is not as the same happens to them when using your website. Be nice if you could fix that
Sicuramente migliorare la reportistica, oggi è troppo generica e  la dashboar non fornisce informazioni utili (ad esempio analisi per tag)

I create large audiences to give our customers updates about their orders and since you moved the Unsubscribe options from "Audience dashboard" to "All contacts", it takes way longer for me to remove these contacts. On the other hand, I like the change of colors and font on the platform :)
i want to be able to segment filters more than 5, i also want to change how my data is picking up the address of my lead. i couldnt figure it out
I would love a monthly report with all my campaigns showing open, rate, click rate and REVENUE.

When adding a new subscriber manually, it used to Auto-fill certain things, like the location. It doesn't do that anymore and I wish it did. 

My subscriber count used to refresh after entering each new subscriber manually. Now it only refreshes when I click my browser's refresh button. Don't like that.

I wish there was a way to bulk enter manually a handful of new subscribers without having to scroll up and down the whole page. Maybe a quick grid for entering multiple.

I wish you could add tags to a subscriber easily from the list. I have done this before but it's not simple.

I wish I was notified whenever a subscriber unsubscribed. Not by email but maybe an alert the next time I sign in with a link to a list of recent unsubscribes.

Seems to be some technical difficulty with the AddEvent integration. Keeps giving me red exclamations over the calendar apps, even though they do seem to be working.

Email reminders I can set for myself to remind me to send campaigns would be nice.

I would love to see a report for each email campaign which tells me how many and to which subscribers my email went to spam. I don't know if this is possible, but would be nice.

I'll think of more after I send this.
tardan en refljarse las aperturas , varios clientes me han reportado no estar recibiendo mi publicidad

It's labor intensive to look up individual contacts, see whether or not they are subscribed or tagged tagged properly without several key stokes per contact. It would be wonderful if I could type in a first name, pull up report of everyone with that first name AND ALL their info, and be able to update contacts from that report without having to open each contact as a separate page.

Hi, I really like the Resend feature and we use it from time to time. However, there's no way to go back to the original design and make improvements. It would be really interesting to test the recommendations out of the reports and implement them, to see the new metrics compared to the original. Alternatively, a useful feature would be if one could isolate all non-opens from a campaign and target them in a new, improved one.

In the chart view, the scale results from my question (answers on a scale of 0-10) are completely inaccurate. It says 30% of the responses are "0" but that's not true at all. When I am in table view or when I export the data to csv the data is correct. But I spend days thinking most people were very upset when that wasn't the case at all.

I filled out some thing that was, in my understanding just a follow up message to clients if I ever did send an email to say thanks for coming in and using Anew. This message was sent out to all of my database and I had a 7% unsubscribe. I dont blame them. its junk mail and spam and thats not what I am trying to do here. I just want to let them know of vital things, like the fact that I've moved into a nice new clinic and now provide Lymphatic drainage, cupping and dry needling. That I am offering a juicy discount for the opening of the clinic. I can't even get past putting in a stupid logo picture. Its just somehow gotten complicated beond being able to simply folow prompts and get it done and it stresses me out. I need to let my clients know I'm here.

the eepurl link for my signup form goes to an information error page. http://eepurl.com/diB89P What can I use as a link to ask people to sign up please? There is no way of contacting support to report such errors.
There are major issues with the analytics, performance and changes that are not communicated. Lately the performance have been horrible!!!

Wasted time and had to use support to discover that the Recipient Activity summary uses total send data even when the Overview report is set to exclude Apple MPP. I'd like that to be obvious in the Recipient activity summary if the exclude setting is active elsewhere or, better, that the Recipient Activity summary uses the same analysis of the Send data is the exclude MPP option is set.

Deleting contacts permanently is required in general to ensure data privacy, however, when you delete a contact (not archive) the system says you can NEVER re-add them in the future. this is not good. I want to remove the lists of people permanently not archive, but later they may need to be added but it won't be allowed. This is not good for trying to reduce the risk of a notifiable data breach as if they are in the archive, they could still be considered to have been breached. Not good at all.

Not charge extra for extra stats - at least not for non-profits.  We are an elementary PTA that uses this platform...  I'd like to review greater performance metrics but as a non-profit, we can't spend more on the added bells and whistles.
I would really like to further define me campaign reports by tags so i can see how certain tags perform and get lists based on this.

Gestione dei contatti coplicato e poco trasparente. Invio di email di comunicazioni, non campagne, estremamente complicato e difficile. Esempio: comunicazione a clienti divisi per province o settore del cambio dell'agente di zona o informazioni spot veicolato estremamente compliato. Difficoltà enorme di creare liste e rimodellarle all'occorrenza. Non si riesce ad avere una visione globale del database dei contatti e a correggere in modo facile quanto si vuole correggere. In generale pessimo. Per il resto, campagne la gestione e il servizio è buono, ma per il mio uso a breve vi abbandonerò per una soluzione più facile da gestire.

For exported reports (especially comparative reports) could we please get the subject line as a column? The campaign name is useful, but the subject line usually tells us right away why opens were higher or lower. Thank you!
I know we can't be the only business who wants to see the preview text displayed in reports. Please add this info to individual campaign reports right underneath the subject line.
Would like to be able to see formatting data of former paragraphs - and few more things more I don't remember just now.
I think the dashboard page is confusing and needs to be more simplified and user friendly. I love what we are able to do with this program. But It's tedious on how to do it.
